problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
